name: leonfindel
description: Leonfindel — portfolio audiovisual buscable (Astro + Cloudflare Workers + D1 + Vectorize)

scripts.test: npm --prefix workers/ingest test --if-present && npm --prefix workers/search test --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck && npm --prefix workers/ingest run typecheck && npm --prefix workers/search run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/web install && npm --prefix workers/ingest install && npm --prefix workers/search install
